purpose: Record the focused Defense & Avoidance sub-bucket pass from the strict Combat bucket.

policy.engineReuse: Use existing attack-option, reaction, and damage-threshold seams. Do not create a parallel defense engine.
policy.staticVsConditional: Static bonuses and damage-threshold rules are normalized as concrete metadata. Situational feats use player/workflow-selected runtime helpers where exact spatial or state context is required.
policy.alreadyCovered: Flurry and Melee Defense are already handled by core attack-option hooks. Combat Reflexes is already handled by core combat reaction hooks.

implementedEntries.name: Fight Through Pain
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to resourceRules.damageThreshold USE_WILL_AS_BASE with useBest=true.

implementedEntries.name: Tumble Defense
implementedEntries.mechanic: Advisory helper adds actor BAB to opponent Acrobatics Tumble DC when the actor is not flat-footed and threatens with a proficient melee weapon.

implementedEntries.name: Predictive Defense
implementedEntries.mechanic: Advisory metadata records Dexterity-or-Intelligence Reflex Defense selection; sheet/player handles actual defense ability choice.

implementedEntries.name: Moving Target
implementedEntries.mechanic: Activated helper exposes +1 dodge Reflex Defense until start of next turn when movement from turn start is at least 3 squares or the workflow marks Moving Target active.

implementedEntries.name: Trench Warrior
implementedEntries.mechanic: Player-selected attack advisory applies +1 circumstance attack bonus when adjacent cover protects the attacker from the target's ranged attacks.

implementedEntries.name: Cunning Attack
implementedEntries.mechanic: Player-selected attack advisory applies +2 feat attack bonus against flat-footed or Dexterity-denied targets and marks denied-Dex feat context.

implementedEntries.name: Resilient Strength
implementedEntries.mechanic: Advisory metadata records Strength-or-Constitution Fortitude Defense selection; sheet/player handles actual defense ability choice.

implementedEntries.name: Wary Defender
implementedEntries.mechanic: Fight Defensively helper exposes +2 competence bonuses to Fortitude and Will until beginning of next turn.
